escalation.rationale: US warns of resuming Iran war while Russian drone strikes Romanian building and Israel expands Lebanese operations.

ticker_items: Russian drone crashes into Romanian apartment building
US warns capable of resuming Iran war as Trump toughens deal terms
Israel expands operations in Lebanon, controls 60% of Gaza
Poland moves to strip Zelensky of highest honor over unit naming

eastern_europe.description: Russian drone crashed into Romanian apartment building exposing Europe's aerial defense vulnerabilities.

middle_east.description: Hezbollah launched rockets at beach area in northern Israel causing panic among civilians.

russia.text: We are operating in Beirut, in the Beqaa, across the entire width of the front, and we are dealing Hezbollah a crushing blow.
russia.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
russia.title: Israeli Prime Minister

middle_east.text: The United States is more than capable of resuming war with Iran after President Trump said any peace deal must adhere to his red lines.
middle_east.speaker: Pete Hegseth
middle_east.title: US Defense Secretary

observers.description: Japan dispatched four Self-Defense Force personnel to NATO's Ukraine support hub in Germany for the first time. The command coordinates training and assistance operations with around 700 staff members.
Pakistan deployed 8,000 troops, fighter jets, and Chinese-made air defense systems to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty. The deployment began in early April according to Reuters reports.

financial.notes: No significant financial developments reported in today's headlines.

update_log.text: Hezbollah rockets target Israeli beach causing civilian panic in Nahariya.
US Defense Secretary warns America capable of resuming Iran war as Trump hardens deal terms.
Russian drone crashes into Romanian apartment building exposing European air defense gaps.
